tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: The Greatest Showman - This Is Me

content:

Hit me[/tab]

[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Abm[/ch]
Ooh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                                                [ch]Abm[/ch]
I put it right there, made it easy for you to get to[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]                                             [ch]Abm[/ch]
Now you want to act like ya don't know what to do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
After I done everything that you ask me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]

[tab][ch]Abm[/ch]
Ooh[/tab]

I'm startin' to believe that I'm way too much for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]                                            [ch]Abm[/ch]

[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
All them lies like you could satisfy me[/tab]

Ooh[/tab]

[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]                                                     [ch]Abm[/ch]

[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
Take me out so deep when you know you can't swim[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]

[tab][ch]Abm[/ch]
Ooh[/tab]

[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
Didn't mama teach you to give affection?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]
